places.name: Steak 48
places.quote: Really delicious steak, lamb chops, and traditional steakhouse sides. Pretty touristy but a good dinner!

places.name: Gibsons Bar & Steakhouse
places.quote: Their amazing food is matched by their absolute top notch service. Most servers have been there for years and they 100% take care of their food allergic guests.

places.name: RPM Steak
places.quote: Celebrated my graduation here because RPM restaurants are the best for managing allergies!

places.name: The Clubhouse Oakbrook
places.quote: They offered us an allergy menu, but were incredibly knowledgeable about every buffet item.

places.name: Chicago Cut
places.quote: The service here is exceptional. My daughter safely had bread, steak, salad, fries and a lot of sides!

places.name: Prime & Provisions Steakhouse
places.quote: They had a clear allergy protocol that included special tickets on orders.

places.name: Maple & Ash
places.quote: Really delicious steak, lamb chops, and traditional steakhouse sides. Pretty touristy but a good dinner!

places.name: Gibsons Bar & Steakhouse
places.quote: Dedicated fryer for French fries, joy for our 9 year old, and delish steaks cooked to perfection.

places.name: Joe's Seafood, Prime Steak & Stone Crab
places.quote: We were so thrilled to see bright pink labels on the bags listing my son’s allergies when we picked up.

places.name: Tango Sur
places.quote: YUM! Portions are huge here and you can’t go wrong with the steak and mashed potatoes!

places.name: Weber Grill Restaurant
places.quote: Our waiter was really helpful and her food had allergy markers when it came out. They have separate grills for beef, chicken, and seafood.

places.name: Sullivan's Steakhouse
places.quote: When we arrived they had notes in the system and all staff was aware. The chef came to the table and verified with our son what he wanted.

places.name: 100 South Chop House & Grille
places.quote: Friendly waitstaff that is very helpful in working with food allergies.

quotes.quote: Their amazing food is matched by their absolute top notch service. Most servers have been there for years and they 100% take care of their food allergic guests.
